title: CT17 static tactic graph — Target thickening
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT17 (Target thickening). It requires the complete 21-node array in fixed source order from CT17.N01 through CT17.N21, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT17 (Target thickening) tactic specification; must equal "CT17".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT17.N01, "Definition — sparse target set and bounded local offset family", in CT17 (Target thickening); must equal "CT17.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT17.N01, "Definition — sparse target set and bounded local offset family"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N01, "Definition — sparse target set and bounded local offset family"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT17.N02, "Lemma — offsets are realizable in the same branch state?", in CT17 (Target thickening); must equal "CT17.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT17.N02, "Lemma — offsets are realizable in the same branch state?"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N02, "Lemma — offsets are realizable in the same branch state?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT17.N03, "Scope candidate — no bounded offsets — scope audit", in CT17 (Target thickening); must equal "CT17.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT17.N03, "Scope candidate — no bounded offsets — scope audit"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N03, "Scope candidate — no bounded offsets — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT17.N04, "Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+", in CT17 (Target thickening); must equal "CT17.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT17.N04, "Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N04, "Lemma — one structural event yields the translate x+"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT17.N05, "Payload record — incompatible completion classes", in CT17 (Target thickening); must equal "CT17.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT17.N05, "Payload record — incompatible completion classes"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N05, "Payload record — incompatible completion classes"; must equal "residual_record", meaning this node records typed data that survives the branch.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N06, "Scale-split theorem — finite range or repeated increments?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N07, "Routing theorem — which separation data exists?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT17.N08, "Payload lemma — build P_17→3 — type separation"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.
